team.name: Scout
team.roleDesc: Monitors LinkedIn, industry news, and competitor activity to identify high-value opportunities.

team.name: Echo
team.roleDesc: Drafts high-engagement posts, suggests content calendar items, and amplifies the brand voice.

team.name: Closer
team.roleDesc: Inputs leads into the CRM, drafts personalized outreach, and coordinates follow-ups with humans-in-the-loop.

projects.title: Lead Pipeline (CRM)
projects.summary: Shared memory for your sales team. Agents discover leads, Closer inputs them, you take the final action.

projects.title: Content Calendar
projects.summary: Autonomous content planning. Echo suggests the posts, you hit Publish.
